seo.title: Mango and Yoghurt Treat - Marinda Kook

html:
This little recipe was born out of necessity one day, with rewarding results. It stays on the table at all my friends' houses in mango season. Elmari Kemp reminded me again of this great treat. Here it is, my friend.

  • 4 mangoes, peeled and sliced into strips
  • large tub plain yoghurt
  • 250ml brown sugar

NOW:

  1. Slice the mangoes into strips and place them in the bottom of a bowl
  2. Pour the yoghurt over the mangoes.
  3. Sprinkle the sugar over the yoghurt.
  4. Leave the mixture in the fridge under cling wrap for at least an hour.

Something happens that I don't quite know how to explain, but it's a deep, wonderful treat. Enjoy it.
